title: SessionExporter.on_session_start payload
description: Fired once per adapter instance, before the first event. Wire representation of the arguments to SessionExporter.on_session_start(session_id, adapter_name, profile).

session_id.description: UUID4 hex assigned to the adapter instance at construction time.

adapter_name.description: One of claude, langchain, openai_agents, crewai, google_adk, or a custom _name set by a downstream adapter subclass.
